playbook.intent: Accumulated design debt -> clean surface + a11y quick wins + retired inconsistent components.
playbook.scope: Designer dedicates 2 weeks to design-debt remediation on a defined product surface. Includes drift audit, debt scoring, microcopy + component normalization, a11y quick wins, and a re-baseline. Done when debt score drops below threshold and a follow-up cadence is in place.

success-criteria.criterion: Debt score reduced below team threshold
Inconsistent components retired or aligned to design system
A11y quick wins (contrast, focus, semantics) shipped
Follow-up cadence (monthly trim) is in place

stage.name: Audit drift
stage.intent: See what is broken before fixing.

tasks.task: Run a Storybook + production drift scan

stage.decision-gate: Advance only when inventory covers the surface.

stage.name: Score debt
stage.intent: Rank what to fix this sprint.

tasks.task: Score items by impact + effort + visibility
Pick a 'must clear' set sized to capacity

stage.decision-gate: Advance only when sprint set fits team capacity.

stage.name: Microcopy normalize
stage.intent: Tone + terms aligned across the surface.

tasks.task: Apply microcopy guide to flagged screens

stage.decision-gate: Advance when batched PRs are merged.

stage.name: Component normalize

tasks.task: Migrate off-token components to system tokens
Update Storybook to reflect the truth

stage.decision-gate: Advance once migrations land in the build.

stage.name: A11y quick wins
stage.decision-gate: Advance only after fixes pass a smoke a11y check.

stage.name: Re-baseline + cadence
stage.intent: Measure the win, lock the cadence.

outputs.output: New baseline + monthly cadence on calendar

stage.decision-gate: Done when score is below threshold and cadence is scheduled.

extra.value: [Trying to fix all debt at once -> nothing ships, Skipping the re-scan -> no evidence the sprint paid off, No monthly trim cadence -> drift returns within a quarter]
['Is the debt score actually below threshold?', 'Did a11y quick wins ship, not just file?', 'Is the monthly trim on the calendar?']

{human: faion get-content design-debt-remediation-sprint-2-weeks --format md, agent: faion get-content design-debt-remediation-sprint-2-weeks --format context, json: faion get-content design-debt-remediation-sprint-2-weeks --format json}
[{version: 1.0.0, date: 2026-05-20, note: Initial draft from F-059-063 chunk-05.}]
